seoTitle: Ben Lomond vs Benandarah — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Ben Lomond and Benandarah. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Ben Lomond vs Benandarah: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Ben Lomond and Benandarah.
heading: Ben Lomond vs Benandarah — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Ben Lomond, New South Wales and Benandarah, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Benandarah has a lower overall climate risk score (30/100) compared to Ben Lomond (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Ben Lomond or Benandarah safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Ben Lomond has a flood risk score of 35/100, while Benandarah scores 40/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Ben Lomond scores 28/100 for bushfire risk. Benandarah scores 24/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Ben Lomond or Benandarah?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Benandarah has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.15% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
